target: 6. Date?
Lunchtime… it's already over.

Ah, this is terrible.
I said I'd be back soon, but I left the store anyway.

It'll be fine.
Dad, Mio, and everyone else are used to being busy.

You know what?
Not only with Totsumura, but you should apologize to Mio and Alain too.

Why!?
I said I wouldn't help in the first place.

Besides, Shinpei,
It's been forever since you came back to the island,
and the only thing to do is help with the store?

It's fine.
I'm just doing what I want to do.
You mean helping at the store is what you want to do?

Something wrong with that?
I'm studying cooking in Tokyo now, after all.
That's true…
Hey Shinpei, Ushio!
Ah, Sou.

What are you two doing?
Dating?

D-…?!
No way, you idiot!!

Ow!?
What did I do to deserve that?
Hmph!!
You okay, Sou?

Ah, yeah.
Well, this is normal for us.
I'm used to it now.

Haha, while I was gone,
you two were still the same as always.

Yeah, just in time.
I wanted to ask you something, Shinpei.
Me? What?

How long are you staying here?
Since it's summer vacation, you should take it easy for a while, right?

Ah, I'd like to, but
due to work and other stuff,
I have to go back to Tokyo by the weekend.
Huh!?
W-What…?

Hey, Shinpei!!
I didn't hear anything about this at all!!

You didn't tell her?
You stayed at Ushio's yesterday, right?
Ah, well…
What were you thinking, Shinpei!?

I wasn't keeping it a secret.
But since Ushio's been so angry all along,
I couldn't get it out…

Don't make excuses!
It's not like you didn't know it was important to tell me first!

If you were so bothered by it,
you could've just asked me directly!

Don't blame me!
It's because you started acting weird right after we met again!

Weird?
What did you do?

N-Not that! 
It's a misunderstanding, Sou!
…Hmph!
Hey, Ushio…

I'm leaving!
Don't follow me!
But I have to go back to the store…

You idiot, Shinpei!
I said don't follow me!
Ah…
She's already gone.
Ah…

So, Shinpei…
What did you do to Ushio?

I didn't do anything weird!
It's not like there's anything you're imagining,
there's absolutely nothing like that!
Don't deny it so desperately…

Well, that's true.
You two are always like that.

Huh… I'm so tired.
It's been like this since yesterday.
(Just when I thought I could finally talk normally…)

Still, you're leaving by the weekend?
That's a bit too soon, isn't it?

Maybe, but…
I have my reasons.

I guess that's true,
but Ushio might feel it's a bit cold-hearted.
I can kind of understand her anger.

Well, are you staying at Ushio's house tonight?
Eat something good and cheer up.

No, I was planning to go back to my parents' house
after helping out at the store.

Huh?
Did you tell her that?

If you didn't, 
she'll probably get angry again.
…That might be bad.

I see…
Then I'll pray for your safety.
I hope you make it back to Tokyo alive.
Do that…

Seriously, before you go back to Tokyo,
sort things out with Ushio.

If you two end up fighting,
you'll regret it for years.
"You should've been honest…"
…Ah.

(That's right…
I don't want to regret it again.)

(If I don't talk to Ushio as soon as possible…)
(Things might get worse.)
